page_metadata.biotools__summary: Annotate microscopy time series of complex cell surfaces with 3D virtual reality (VR). It allows the annotation of colour surfaces segmented from microscopy movies using either a VR headset and controllers, or computer screen with mouse and keyboard.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Annotate microscopy time series of complex cell surfaces with 3D virtual reality (VR). It allows the annotation of colour surfaces segmented from microscopy movies using either a VR headset and controllers, or computer screen with mouse and keyboard.
